title: myosotis zeylanica
intro: Myosotis zeylanica, also known as the Ceylon blue forget-me-not, is a perennial herb belonging to the borage family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Myosotis zeylanica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
